productDisplayName: Casio Sheen Women Silver Analogue Watches (SX004) SHN-5014D-7ADR
description: Case style: Chronograph analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel back, has stone embellishments along the rimDial style: White dial, has three hands, stone-studded markingsFeatures: A screw and two push buttons to reset the time and features, three-faced chronograph display, a date apertureStrap style: Stainless steel strap with a butterfly claspWater-resistantComes in a signature CASIO caseWarranty: 1 year
